features.name: non-blocking assignment in level-sensitive always block
features.description: Code should include a level-sensitive always block (always @(sig) not always @(posedge sig)) containing non-blocking assignments to a reg variable

features.name: race_condition_between_concurrent_always_blocks
features.description: Code should include two always blocks with different sensitivity (one level-sensitive, one edge-sensitive) that both access the same reg variable on the same clock edge
